who: accounting firms managing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week
offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes reporting delays. We consolidate and reconcile transactions instead of manual spreadsheets and email summaries.
problem: manual reconciliation of petty cash transactions leads to errors and delays in reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach with demo videos to target firms
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of petty cash transactions and weekly summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
